evidence_refs: WM-3: ActionCard now passes onLongPress={() => setFocusedNodeId(action.id)} to CardShell, wiring the 400ms long-press path that opens EditorViewerIsland with action context (E02 acceptance criterion).
retraction_note: PO rolled back ActionCard onLongPress post-WM-3 (2026-06-30). Editor is task-only in this version. E02 scope retracted; REQ-EVI-001 coverage remains via TaskCard (E01) only.
